pickle/HIGHEST_PROTOCOL.name: HIGHEST_PROTOCOL
pickle/HIGHEST_PROTOCOL.description: An integer, the highest protocol version available. This value can be passed as a protocol value to functions dump() and dumps() as well as the Pickler constructor.

info.excerpt: An integer, the highest protocol version available. This value can be passed as a protocol value to functions dump() and dumps() as well as the Pickler constructor.
